mapper.select:
select p.id as playlistId, p.title as title, p.style as style, p.play_count as playCount, p.create_time as createTime, p.update_time as updateTime, u.username as username,
(select count(*) from tb_playlist_like pl where pl.playlist_id = p.id) as likeCount,
(select count(*) from tb_playlist_comment pc where pc.playlist_id = p.id) as commentCount from tb_playlist p left join tb_user u on p.user_id = u.id
and p.title like concat('%',#{dto.title},'%')
and p.style like concat('%',#{dto.style},'%')
and p.user_id = #{dto.userId}
order by ${dto.orderBy} ${dto.sortRule}
